folio.label: 67r
folio.l: And whan that she , hir fader , hatú I founde
Doun on hire knees , falletú she to g¼unde
Wepynge for tendirnesse , in hert blithe
She herietú god , an hundred thousand sithe
¢ In vertue of&of& holy , almes dede
They lyuen alle , and neuäe a sonder wende
Til deetú departetú hem , this lif they lede
And faretú now wel , my tale is at an ende
Now iúu crist , that of his mygút may sende
Ioye after woo , gouerne vs , in his grace
And kepe vs alle , that ben in this place

note.notetxt: 1064 ¢ Amen q¶ Wytton~ These words occur in the right margin.
